series_metadata.series_description: Form GO2712 is used as a cover sheet for assignments completed by field audit staff. The form lists, but is not limited to, history of work on an employer account, type of assignment, contribution tax report, benefit payment information, audit findings, inquiries and collections. All documentation pertaining to the completed assignment is attached to the cover sheet. The name of staff person handling the assignment and the date the assignment was completed is also listed.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office ; Electronic: in office
